positive: A central, stylized geometric representation of a mythical forest spirit, blending nature and abstract art. The figure should consist of interconnected organic lines, leaf motifs, and glowing ethereal elements, giving the impression of a strong silhouette against a contrasting background. Use rich emerald green, deep sapphire blue, and gold accents. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, ideal for screen printing on a t-shirt. Style: Modern folklore meets Art Nouveau linework, high contrast vector aesthetic, limited palette, tattoo flash style. Clean lines, crisp edges, isolated on a solid off-white background.
negative: blurry, artifacts, grain, noise, text, watermark, logo, trademark, signature, cartoon, photo, blurry background, ugly, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, out of frame
